note: WHYPE = Wrapped HYPE (HyperEVM chain 999), a verified WETH9 fork. ALL 5 external-mutating functions are the standard ERC20 + wrap/unwrap wallet surface and are covered: approve/transfer/transferFrom (token::erc20_*), deposit/withdraw (token::wrap_native/unwrap_native).

0x095ea7b3.name: approve
0x095ea7b3.reason: ERC20 approve — wallet grants a spender allowance over WHYPE; cover (token::erc20_approve).

0xd0e30db0.name: deposit
0xd0e30db0.reason: WETH9 deposit() — wraps native HYPE into WHYPE (amount = msg.value); cover (token::wrap_native).

0xa9059cbb.name: transfer
0xa9059cbb.reason: ERC20 transfer — wallet moves WHYPE; cover (token::erc20_transfer).

0x23b872dd.name: transferFrom
0x23b872dd.reason: ERC20 transferFrom — spender-initiated WHYPE move; cover (token::erc20_transfer).

0x2e1a7d4d.name: withdraw
0x2e1a7d4d.reason: WETH9 withdraw(wad) — unwraps WHYPE back to native HYPE; cover (token::unwrap_native).
